rows.label: tev027001_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev027001_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Phil about the Nopon Bazaar.

rows.label: tev027001_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev027001_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Phil if anything is troubling her.

rows.label: tev027001_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Phil what it was
like during the attack.

rows.label: tev027001_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask Phil what the Nopon were
doing during the attack.

rows.label: tev027001_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Phil about the Nopon caravan.

rows.label: tev027001_SEL0091
rows.name: Ask Phil where Chirochiro is.

rows.label: tev027001_SEL0101
rows.name: Ask Phil if anything is troubling her.

rows.label: tev027001_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Phil about the Nopon.

rows.label: tev027001_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Phil about recent developments.

rows.label: tev027001_SEL1041
rows.name: Ask Phil about recent developments.

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0001
rows.name:
It looks like the rare items
on sale here are brought in
by Nopon from across Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0002
rows.name:
The accessories on display were so cool that I
walked right into their trap. When shopping is
this fun, you know there has to be a catch.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0003
rows.name:
They're such smooth little talkers
that you end up buying all kinds
of junk you don't need.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0004
rows.name:
If you need to haggle with
them, definitely remember to
keep your wits about you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0010
rows.name:
Oh my god, this is mortifying. I just got through
telling Dana she needs to "find a way to shine"
if she wants to reel in this guy she likes...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0011
rows.name:
And now look whose head is sparkling brighter
than a freshly waxed floor. My head! Dana
is gonna have a field day with this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0012
rows.name:
I can hear her already: "Oh, wow. That is
one shiny noggin, chrome dome! Don't go
blinding any Doll pilots with that!" Ugh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0013
rows.name:
I need to find a wig before she
has a chance to give me any crap.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0014
rows.name:
That Chirochiro character is gonna get
it for selling me that snake oil![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0020
rows.name:
Luckily, NLA runs evacuation
drills, so we knew exactly
what to do in an emergency.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0021
rows.name:
We were able to get to safety
with minimal casualties.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0022
rows.name:
A lot of that was because the Nopon hadn't
moved in yet. I shudder to think how things
would've gone down if THEY were around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0023
rows.name:
They probably would've freaked out
and disrupted the entire evacuation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0024
rows.name:
Then, right when we were at our most frazzled,
they would have aggressively tried to sell us
pepper spray or home security cameras or something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0030
rows.name:
Are you kidding? The bazaar was
probably the liveliest place around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0031
rows.name:
The second they caught wind we were under attack,
the Nopon immediately broke out a stash of food
rations and emergency survival products.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0032
rows.name:
They played us like a bunch of terrified little
fiddles. I could've sworn I heard one of them
literally shout, "Buy this crap if want to live!"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0033
rows.name:
Well, I must be a total sucker,
'cause even I caved and bought
myself a "bomb-proof hood."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0034
rows.name:
Then again, it DID prevent everyone in the
shelter from seeing what happened to my hair,
so I guess that still counts as self-defense.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0040
rows.name:
Did you notice the Nopon have
a caravan in Cauldros? As in,
where the Growth base is?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0041
rows.name:
I told Chirochiro to step up her
game, but I never imagined she'd
send her people into that death trap.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0042
rows.name:
The Nopon are a lot of things,
but those cute little swindlers
are definitely not cowards.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0043
rows.name:
I guess when the smell of rare and lucrative
merchandise comes wafting over, "life and
limb" take a solid second place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0048
rows.name:
The merchants at the Nopon
bazaar said they spotted
Chirochiro in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0049
rows.name:
Don't tell me she went someplace
as dangerous as that just to find
me some hair-growth medicine...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0050
rows.name:
Because that would legitimately
make me feel bad.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0055
rows.name:
Oh my god, this is mortifying. I just got through
telling Dana she needs to "find a way to shine"
if she wants to reel in this guy she likes...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0056
rows.name:
And now look whose head is sparkling brighter
than a freshly waxed floor. My head! Dana
is gonna have a field day with this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0057
rows.name:
I can hear her already: "Oh, wow. That is
one shiny noggin, chrome dome! Don't go
blinding any Doll pilots with that!" Ugh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG0058
rows.name:
I need to find a wig before she
has a chance to give me any crap.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG1001
rows.name:
Those little fellas make the slog all the way
from Nightglow Forest in the west to Cauldros in
the north, and they do it over and over again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG1002
rows.name:
In the process, they manage to find stuff
rare enough to make the most accomplished
Collepedian giggle in delight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG1003
rows.name:
Those guys are some seriously
hardcore merchants. Not just
Chirochiro—all of them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG1004
rows.name:
Sometimes I think we still have a few
things to learn from the locals.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG1010
rows.name:
Oh! Guess what! When I was at work,
Victoria told me she likes my hair the
way it is! Or isn't or...whatever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG1011
rows.name:
I respect her fashion opinion more than
anyone else in the city, so to hear her
say that pretty much made my existence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG1012
rows.name:
Seriously, I feel like a brand-new woman
now. I'm ready to work my butt off and
make NLA's fashion scene really shine![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG1017
rows.name:
I had lunch with Dana for the first
time in a while the other day, and
you won't believe this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG1018
rows.name:
She was wearing an eyeball! This girl
was actually wearing a real indigen
EYEBALL necklace. That is just so...wrong.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG1019
rows.name:
After she was done trying to explain why it
was "hip," I made her take it off and gave
her something less... anatomical to wear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG1020
rows.name:
Crisis averted. Thank you,
fashion intervention![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027001_MSG1021
rows.name:
I mean geez! I know her heart's in the
right place, but a third eye isn't
going to help her nab a boyfriend.[ST:wait ]
